steps.title: Set up the conversion factor
steps.content: We know that 1 yard equals 3 feet, so the conversion factor is $$\frac{3 \text{ feet}}{1 \text{ yard}}$$. Multiplying the given yards by this factor cancels yards and leaves feet: $$34 \text{ yards} \times \frac{3 \text{ feet}}{1 \text{ yard}} = 34 \times 3 \text{ feet}$$

steps.title: Calculate and pick the answer choice
steps.content:
Carrying out the multiplication gives the number of feet. Comparing this result to the answer choices shows that it
The answer is 102.
